subcodes.first_line: O friends of 'Abdu'l-Bahá! Blessed, blessed be ye that are occupied in service and have turned away from all save God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران عبدالبهاء خوشا خوشا بحال شما که بخدمت مشغولید و از دون حق منفور و
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @thankfulness; gratitude
